name: 15 Minutes to Midnight
author: Aaron Sleege
bootlegger: This script can last at most T minutes. After T minutes, if any Riot is alive, sober and healthy, evil wins. During the day, the players can put up a nomination to skip the day. If at least the majority of people raised their hand in the next half a minute, the day ends immediately. On days 1 & 2, nominations are opened immediatly. No private conversations are allowed. If the Widow is taking longer than needed to make their choice, they might die.  [9 ≤ T ≤ 15]
